title: Update Settings
description: Configure the LaCentrale Cars Scraper settings

content.introduction: Configure your LaCentrale Cars Scraper settings. Control pagination, result limits, time filters, and whether to fetch detailed listing information.

rows.description: Maximum pages to scrape per task (max: 347)
Maximum unique results across all tasks
Only scrape listings published within N hours
Fetch detailed listing info (equipment, seller details)

detailsOption.title: Listing Details Option
detailsOption.content:
When `annonce_details` is enabled, the scraper visits each listing page to extract:

- Full equipment list and options
- Seller details (address, company info)
- Technical specifications (CO2, power, fuel consumption)
- Vehicle history links

**Pricing:** 4 credits per listing when details are enabled.

hoursBack.title: Hours Back Filter
hoursBack.content:
Use `hours_back` to monitor new inventory. For example, setting `hours_back: 24` will stop scraping when it reaches listings older than 24 hours (based on `first_online_date`).

Perfect for daily monitoring of new car listings.

proTips.content: Set `annonce_details: false` if you only need basic listing data to reduce costs.
Enabling `annonce_details` costs 4 additional credits per listing. Plan accordingly for large scrapes.
Use `hours_back: 12` for twice-daily monitoring to catch new listings without duplicates.

seo.title: Update Settings - LaCentrale Cars Scraper - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to configure LaCentrale Cars Scraper settings using the Lobstr.io API.
